arts.ttl: How to watch Liverpool vs Tottenham for free: TV channel and live stream for Carabao Cup
arts.sum: Liverpool host Tottenham Hotspur in the second leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final tonight with the north London side holding a 1-0 advantage

arts.ttl: 'I burst into tears after making Tottenham debut vs Liverpool – it ruined my career'
arts.sum: Shayon Harrison had high hopes when he entered the fray against Liverpool in his Tottenham Hotspur debut, but left the field in tears after missing a crucial chance to make a name for himself

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Arne Slot makes transfer admission amid Alexander-Arnold injury
arts.sum: Liverpool have a stiff test to remain in all cup competitions in the coming days but Arne Slot is confident in his side despite making no new signings during the transfer window

arts.ttl: Liverpool cannot escape short-term priority as Arne Slot set for ideal dress rehearsal
arts.sum: Our fan jury have their say on a big week for the Reds in three different competitions

arts.ttl: Arne Slot dismisses Liverpool injury 'luck' theory as behind-the-scenes changes explained
arts.sum: Arne Slot explains how he and his staff have managed to avoid a Liverpool injury pile-up with just Trent Alexander-Arnold currently sidelined for the Reds

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah aiming for another milestone as Tottenham could become the new Man Utd
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah will be key to Liverpool's chances of beating Tottenham in the Carabao Cup and the forward could also break a major personal milestone in the process

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes admission over Liverpool summer plan and 'new regime' transfer priority
arts.sum: Arne Slot talks Liverpool's summer transfer plans and how they might be influenced by the contract situations of Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold

arts.ttl: League One manager reveals he has reached out to Ange Postecoglou - after admitting he was 'embarrassed' by making swipe at Tottenham boss
arts.sum: Asked in a post-match interview whether injuries had played a part in Saturday's 1-0 loss, Wellens said: 'I'm not going to make excuses, I'm not Ange Postecoglou.'

arts.ttl: Tottenham landed £23m Brazilian and former Real Madrid defender in January transfers
arts.sum: Defoe's contribution was significant, scoring 143 goals in 363 appearances for Spurs, helping the club avoid relegation and secure a spot in the Champions League. A key player in that same League Cup-winning team, Jonathan Woodgate, joined Tottenham in January 2008.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane and Mathys Tel agree on one thing as Tottenham transfer decision imminent
arts.sum: Tel, who arrived in Germany one year before Kane, was still only 17 at the time of his transfer. In Tel's first year at Bayern he started just one league game, for example.
